What is up everybody welcome back this is our playbook on the post webinar profit maximizer this is part of ace number three and it's all in service of that 100% close ethos that we spoke about in the source code so this obviously pertains to webinar it's a playbook to execute and implement for high intent webinar leads so webinar pre-customers those who were on they asked questions they engaged and they stayed till the end or close to the end at least long enough to see your pitch and your presentation and of course they didn't yet buy so they haven't cleared ace number three they're still hanging out in this ecosystem of having been presented an offer but not having made a decision yet so things to know about this context about the pre-customer who has ascended to this specific container this pre-customer is hyper invested they've already invested time you know likely close to an hour of their time which does have a cost to it right especially if they're in a B2B setting if you're talking to another business owner that time has a monetary value associated with it not to mention the energy and the attention and the mental bandwidth they've invested into the experience so they've already invested so much in being coached to that finish line by tuning into your offer presentation and this is really where ascending them to a more intimate touch point during this moment of heightened receptivity where they've made such a large investment can often be the difference maker between them moving into the next deco system which is you know your paid program and you know that whole world in fulfillment or them just kind of dropping off and being in this kind of once again purgatory state of an almost customer who didn't quite get there this time around so what are we going to be doing with this playbook well following your webinar you'll reference a transcript of the chat right to see who asked questions so that's an engagement indicator we're going to look for who asked questions on the webinar particularly questions after the pitch has already been made so they're not necessarily asking questions around your content and the teaching you're doing on the webinar although that's certainly something you can reference as well and reply to people with post webinar to make sure that got answered we're really cluing in on who had questions about the offer and if your webinar platform provides it which it should provide you'll collect the names and emails of those who stayed through the pitch so not necessarily to not necessarily till the very very end of the thing but at least long enough to know what your offer is and have been walked through you know the various components of it cool so what are we going to do well you or a member of your team will follow up with them individually on a more intimate channel so that intimate channel could be via your personal email your gmail to their email address it could be a text message if you've been collecting phone numbers and that's a channel that they would not be opposed to being contacted on it could be messenger if a lot of your webinar signups came in through your facebook group or it could be a video message like the loo messages we've been teaching you how to send throughout and what you're going to do is twofold one just make sure they got their question answered right if they asked something in that q and a even if you did answer it live just check in right make sure that they heard that reply and if they have any other questions right and then of course yeah see if they have any other needs any other concerns any other questions any other points of clarity they need before making an informed and empowered decision and that's really um languaging you're gonna hear a lot in this module is we are here in service of helping them make informed and empowered decisions cool so why are we doing this this is the biggest reason really it's to overcome this dreaded post webinar letdown now let me explain what that is so a live webinar um provides especially if someone joined the party they engage they stay till the end it provides this heightened intimate container where they feel seen and accountable right it's almost as if you're speaking to them especially true if you actually are addressing them addressing those in the room right and if you only have 20 or 30 or 40 people in the room it feels very personal and very intimate right um usually there's a high energy on the webinar especially if you're really kind of getting people amped up about what's possible if you're being um you know leadership oriented around coaching people through their questions there is a high energetic tonality to this setting and then that just all kind of evaporates post webinar like all the air gets sucked out of the room and they once again feel anonymous non-accountable um negating responsibility essentially it goes from like this dynamic exchange um even though the webinar could be one to many there's at least this adaptability and this dynamism to it to all of a sudden holy crap the moment is gone right i'm back in my basement alone in this life that i was living before the webinar and it's almost as if it didn't happen because that whole container has collapsed and evaporated um and the magic is kind of gone right and in 99 of the cases um coaches program creators course creators will simply kind of rely on their automated post webinar sales emails to close the deal which once again it is effective scaffolding we're not saying get rid of it but just acknowledge it as incomplete remember it gives structural integrity to our post webinar funnel but it's not everything right and we want to do everything in our power um to avoid downgrading our pre-customers experience on the paid scale the paid scale if you remember we want to ascend people to as to um a container that is personal alive intimate and dynamic essentially messenger dm text sales page chat or a one-on-one call something in this upper right quadrant is where we gradually want to graduate people to especially on high value deals to high intent prospects and pre-customers who've taken enough initiative and invested themselves enough in the process to warrant being graduated to that upper right quadrant someone who has stayed on your webinar through the pitch um certainly qualifies as someone who has warranted that kind of reach out so the goal send your post webinar follow-up emails as you usually do with a focus on coaching decisiveness and once again there are all sorts of templates on how to do that inside 10x launches modules six and seven as well as um six figure emails and seven figure emails so no shortage on templates that coach decisiveness but also initiate one-on-one exchanges with those who stayed beyond the invitation and the pitch and or asked questions so how are we going to do this very basic template not rigid certainly make it your own you're better off um essentially riffing on it and making it your own then having it feel overly formulaic but this is what we would roll is so honor them for being on the webinar investing their time and attention bring their energy to the room and ask me their questions make sure they got their question answered and you can even reflect back the specific question they ask and say by the way like I remember you asked this and I may have given it a bit of an answer but now that I have more time to actually marinate on it here's something else I would add so you could actually elaborate on answers as well and simply state that your goal is to help them make that empowered informed confident decision so it's not just a weak follow-up you're not just seeing where they're at right your goal is to be in their corner and get them to this point of making a decision once again the 100 we want to close those decision loops for our best interest and our pre-customers best interest so they can move forward in a way that serves them best and then if there is urgency you can give them a brief reminder of that if there is a real deadline on capturing a certain deal that was offered on the webinar that's an opportunity to do it as well as an option to create a rain check option or even hold the pricing you know hold pricing until you finalize any questions on a strategy call right if that's part of your process you could hold any package right until they get their answers questioned as long as they're engaging you in that process so that's an option you have the rain check and of course a call to action to reply to your personal email your text or book a short call if they just really want to walk through the decision with you so those are five things I would look to include in this reach out once again that reach out could be a direct message it could be a personal email or it could be a loom if you're comfortable doing videos in this context which I do recommend if it's something that you feel good doing so once engaged in this exchange right in this personal dynamic exchange you can make custom offers based off of certain needs that come up now of course from an ethical perspective we don't want to all of a sudden cater to this one person in grossly exaggerated different ways and we're giving to the rest of the list who is investing the same amount of money without having questions right we don't want to overly reward someone for asking questions and penalize those who essentially move forward more confidently but there are things you could do right you can extend payment plans if the current plans are just really prohibitive you know for their finance if you can give longer guarantee windows if there's concern that they won't be able to implement in the standard window you can include some unplanned bonuses that help support their specific situation or help them get through this hurdle that they're coming to the call with so this all becomes doable on throughout this exchange that you're having in this personal setting and this only becomes possible if you're actually engaged with them on that channel so all that said it's really powerful to do right and the personalized post webinar conversations that you're going to get out of it are just super critical if this is a new offer with less than 50 purchases so people love to ask like where are you getting your research from right to write your hooks to write your emails to write your sales pages once you start actually scaling an offer well you get it from your initial batch of customers from people actually using your program right or people who are involved in the enrollment process so if you have less than 50 purchasers right you want to get as much detail as possible you want to know what's coming up you want to know what they need to have the most confident confidence to move forward so if it's a new offer this is definitely a playbook that you're going to want to incorporate without a doubt and same thing if you have less than 50 attendees even on an existing offer if you're running webinars or these sales contacts without a ton of volume where you're not going to hit your revenue goals on sheer force of will you know through numbers alone you have to make the most out of every opportunity and making the most out of every opportunity is treating all those attendees as the individuals they are with the individual concerns they might have right not just pushing everyone to the exact same um FAQ email right but getting super nuanced in detail of what are their questions what do they need to ask and get total clarity on before making a final decision so all that said a little bit of tough love that may or may not be relevant for you but few things hurt an online business more than believing you're bigger than you are and that this direct in the trenches conversion coaching as I like to call it with your pre-customers is somehow beneath you so a lot of the resistance I get are people who feel like well that's not scalable you know I can't reach out to everyone who attended my webinar right but when you really factor in that these reach outs can be the difference between a $2,000 sale and no sale at all right these reach outs have a high ROI both in the revenue you generate as well as the insights that come from those exchanges and conversations that you then get to actually include on your next webinar pitch or the next sales page or the next email that you write for the very same launch so there's so much to be gained in doing this right and I don't know if this is a lingering thing for you that shows up in that resistance but be willing bandwidth permitting to get in the trenches have these conversations and be in service of everyone who has invested time and attention in you huge difference maker so all that said I'm going to give you a little bit of an example of something we might say to Phil you know if he stepped into our webinar for automated intimacy so he might say hey Phil really appreciate you joining yesterday's crazy fight club inspired masterclass love the energy and questions you brought to the room just wanted to person check in to make sure you got all your questions answered and if there's anything else I can offer clarity around to help you make an amazing aligned decision around automated intimacy version 1.0 as you probably know because I'm pretty sure I saw you right till the end the private early bird pricing and bonus workshops are being pulled tomorrow night at 10 pm eastern sharp and for whatever reason you need a bit more time to decide just let me know what's coming up and we can hold that offer for an extra day or two while we close that loop and give you the confidence to move forward in either direction you can reply here or text me directly at your personal number ideally a number that you actually get messages at so that is really this playbook at a glance it's simple but will have profound effect both in the research insights you pick up from engaging in these conversations as well as your actual conversion rates of those who showed up and stayed to the end of your webinar so put it into practice next up we got the tech walkthroughs that are going to show you how to identify that segment and start messaging them so I'll see you there
